states.role: portable dungeon field cooking tripod pot, unlit and ready for night meal
states.silhouette: clear readable silhouette at small game scale
style_constraints: compatible with IMT 2:1 isometric dungeon tiles
small iron cooking pot hanging from a compact tripod over stone-ring firewood
flat solid #FF00FF background, no scene or floor

states.role: portable dungeon field cooking tripod pot with active warm cooking fire and light steam
states.silhouette: clear readable silhouette at small game scale
style_constraints: compatible with IMT 2:1 isometric dungeon tiles
same tripod pot and stone-ring firewood as the unlit state
compact warm flame under the pot
small readable steam from the pot
flat solid #FF00FF background, no scene or floor

generation.prompt_delta: light a compact warm cooking fire under the same pot and add subtle steam while preserving the same tripod, anchor, footprint, silhouette size, and solid chroma-key background

prompt_parts.style: IMT prototype-friendly isometric pixel art dungeon prop
prompt_parts.material: dark iron tripod and cooking pot, small stone fire ring, dry dungeon firewood, warm restrained ember color
prompt_parts.decoration: single compact 1x1 interactable survival-cooking object, no environment, no baked floor
